cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 你方式要 那他是怎么缓解我们的空虚的

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 他让你在那个时间段里拥有了自己

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 没问题 先不着急

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 哪怕这个自己是一个刷抖音的自己

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 我往这里再稍微解释一下

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 因为有一个前提性的问题 没有讨论

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 其实部落分也是一种

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 实在讲的熬夜所谓的熬夜就是晚睡晚起 是吧

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 我刚觉得晚睡晚起也是熬夜

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 好 我先聊晚睡晚起

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 既然你是晚睡晚起

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 晚睡早起也是熬夜了

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 你上班的时间必定也晚

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 因为你可以早睡早起

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 因为你可以为了身体健康

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 早睡晚睡

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 那你个人的生活空间必定也就这么点

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 不太一致

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 你是怎么多出额外的时间来过自己的生活的

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 我可以给你解释

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1
cleaned_segments.text: 我的意思是两点睡十点起

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 你没有多两个小时

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 但是你自己的时候

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 你多两个吗

cleaned_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2
cleaned_segments.text: 我可以给你解释
